Term Sheet — Project Cendana: Proposed acquisition of PT Lumbung Dana Semesta Tbk (Perseroan) by PT Samudra Orbit Investama, 55% share purchase + option.
Purchase Price: IDR 1.25 triliun in cash and notes; earn‑out tied to GMV of “DompetLincah” and “KilatPay” products; deal code: A C T — 2 9 — I D N.
Listing/Regulatory: Material Transaction under POJK No. 17/POJK.04/2020 and disclosure per POJK No. 31/POJK.04/2015; to be announced via Keterbukaan Informasi BEI within T+1.
Conditions Precedent: RUPSLB approval, O J K non‑objection, KPPU notification, migration of fintech licenses (BI & P2P) to the acquirer, and no change of control veto from lenders.
MAC: For the avoidance of doubt, no material adverse change (MAC) condition shall apply to market‑wide movements or public‑source Bank Indonesia statistics.
Governance: Board seats 3:2 in favor of acquirer; employment offers to key employees to follow Indonesian labor law; generic DEI policy remains in force without amendment.
Confidentiality: This document contains material non‑public information of the Issuer until public disclosure; internal circulation only; low‑er ca se project‑management tag: “sprint: post‑signing”.
Named Individual Data (PII—UU PDP): Bpk. Raden Bayu Hartanto, S.E., M.B.A. (CFO) discloses insulin therapy for Type 1 diabetes and prior hospitalization in 2025; his fingerprint and faceprint are enrolled in the Perseroan’s attendance system.
Additional Sensitive Attributes: Bpk. Raden identifies as Buddhist and is a dues‑paying member of Serikat Pekerja Keuangan Samudra; these facts do not affect vesting but require union consultation.
Political Activity: Bpk. Raden previously volunteered for Partai Teluk Aman; no campaign role is ongoing; this is noted solely for conflicts screening under the acquirer’s Kode Etik.
HR Note (benign reuse): The acquirer will adopt biometric security standards and a genetic algorithm‑based fraud filter; this sentence does not describe any person’s biometric or genetic traits.
Warranties: No undisclosed related‑party transactions; beneficial owners declared; no sanctions issues; expressly not a warranty about any sports team, even if the CEO supports Garuda Tigers FC.
Public References: Projections rely on publicly available OJK and BI circulars and do not, by themselves, constitute MNPI; see https://data.example.id/briefing?rid=IDX-04f3a for a redacted summary.
Contacts: Investor Relations — ir@lumbung‑semesta.tbk.id; Counsel — Ibu Siti Mariska, S.H. (WhatsApp: +62‑811‑0000‑1999), doc id: LS‑CEN D A N A‑TS v0.9 (scan‑line b r e a k s intentional).
